description: Database for real-time analytics using Kusto Query Language (KQL). Must be created inside an Eventhouse. Supports streaming ingestion, time-series analysis, and sub-second queries over large datasets.

flags.--eventhouse-id: Parent Eventhouse item ID (required for ReadWrite)

notes: ReadOnlyFollowing requires source database reference instead
Query endpoint uses Kusto REST API (not Fabric API) with token scoped to cluster URI
Management commands (.create table, etc.) use /v1/rest/mgmt endpoint
